name: generate-image
description: Generate or edit images using AI models (FLUX, Gemini). Use for general-purpose image generation including photos, illustrations, artwork, visual assets, concept art, and any image that is not a technical diagram or schematic. For flowcharts, circuits, pathways, and technical diagrams, use the scientific-schematics skill instead.
qualityReason: Broad but well-defined AI image use
capabilities: Generate images from text prompts using FLUX and Gemini models
Edit existing images with natural language instructions
Save generated images as PNG files with custom output paths
Choose between multiple image generation models for quality or speed
Support for PNG, JPEG, GIF, and WebP input formats for editing
author: K-Dense-AI
securitySummary: All 153 static findings are FALSE POSITIVES. The skill is a legitimate image generation tool using OpenRouter API. The static scanner flagged standard API key handling, base64 image encoding, and documentation code blocks as suspicious patterns. No malicious intent or exfiltration behavior was found. The code performs exactly as documented - generating images via API calls to https://openrouter.ai/api/v1/chat/completions.
valueStatement: Create high-quality images for presentations, documents, and publications using AI models. Generate original artwork or edit existing images with simple text prompts. Access FLUX and Gemini models through OpenRouter API.
userTitle: Generate AI images with FLUX and Gemini
limitations: Requires OpenRouter API key with credits for image generation
Cannot generate technical diagrams, schematics, or flowcharts
Generation time varies from 5-30 seconds depending on model
Output limited to PNG format for generated images

useCases.title: Create figures for papers
useCases.description: Generate conceptual illustrations for research papers and presentations with scientific visualization style.

useCases.title: Produce visual assets
useCases.description: Create illustrations, artwork, and marketing visuals for documents, websites, and campaigns.

useCases.title: Design presentation graphics
useCases.description: Generate hero images, backgrounds, and visual aids for slides, posters, and educational materials.

promptTemplates.title: Basic generation
promptTemplates.prompt: Generate an image of [subject] in [style] style, [additional details]

promptTemplates.title: Scientific illustration
promptTemplates.prompt: [Scientific concept description], scientific illustration style, clean and professional, suitable for academic presentation

promptTemplates.title: Image editing
promptTemplates.prompt: Edit this image: [specific instructions for changes to the input image]

promptTemplates.title: Model selection
promptTemplates.prompt: Generate [description] using model black-forest-labs/flux.2-pro, output to [filename].png

bestPractices: Be specific in prompts - describe subjects, styles, lighting, and composition details
Use gemini-3-pro or flux.2-pro models for image editing tasks
Check OpenRouter pricing page to understand model costs before generation
antiPatterns: Do not use for technical diagrams, flowcharts, or schematics - use scientific-schematics skill instead
Do not share API keys in prompts or scripts - store in .env file
Do not expect photorealistic output from FLUX.2-flex - use Pro models for higher quality

faq.question: Which model should I use for image editing?
faq.answer: Use google/gemini-3-pro-image-preview or black-forest-labs/flux.2-pro. Both support image editing capabilities.

faq.question: How do I set up my OpenRouter API key?
faq.answer: Create a .env file with OPENROUTER_API_KEY=your-key or set the environment variable before running.

faq.question: Can I edit images with this skill?
faq.answer: Yes, use the --input flag to provide an existing image and describe your editing instructions in the prompt.

faq.question: What image formats are supported?
faq.answer: Input images can be PNG, JPEG, GIF, or WebP. Generated images are saved as PNG files.

faq.question: Why should I not use this for diagrams?
faq.answer: This skill is designed for artistic images and photos. Use the scientific-schematics skill for flowcharts and diagrams.

faq.question: How long does image generation take?
faq.answer: Generation typically takes 5-30 seconds depending on the model selected and current API load.
